text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the first day of summer camp! With
the sun beating down on us, I'm ready to put Ines
Fujin through some special training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Ryan. I'm looking forward to your
guidance during our afternoon training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let's put in some good work and get you
prepped for the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Since I won't be able to enter, I'll be counting on
you to uphold the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Erm, I was just thinking that if I want to be
like Ryan, I'll need to build some more muscle
first.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Why were you watching me, anyway?! Hurry
up and take the luggage to our rooms!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This summer camp will be over before you know
it, and I don't want to waste a single moment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, our summer camp begins.
